headline: BlackRock Private Credit Fund Takes 5% Hit Amid Software Sector Struggles

headline: BlackRock (BLK) Valuation Check As New Aladdin Private Credit Features With Preqin Draw Focus
summary: BlackRock (BLK) has rolled out new private credit features on its Aladdin platform in partnership with Preqin, giving investors unified access to data, benchmarks, and analytics across multiple private credit structures. See our latest analysis for BlackRock. The new Aladdin private credit rollout lands as BlackRock shares trade at US$1,073.57, with a 1-month share price return of 11.90% and a 1-year total shareholder return of 19.05%. This suggests recent momentum after a softer year to...

headline: BlackRock Fund Faces Test in Recovering Defaulted China Loan
